2280990.name: Tropity
2280990.description:
Welcome to the world of Tropity!

Here you can create your own destiny with endless possibilities. You could play casually and hang out with friends and do whatever you desire. You could also start your own in-game business, get a job or do anything else to make money inside of Tropity which can be spent on user-made or developer-made items. These could be cars, cool weapons/items, clothing for your character, properties, or even a plot of land so you can create whatever you want!

There are loads of fun features in Tropity. Such as:
- 5+ Fully Interactable and detailed jobs
- Business system. Register your business and shape it however you want. Sell services, products, or anything else!
- Economy system and bank accounts for managing finances
- Fully constructible plots to make your dream properties
- Interactable Tropity city with all sorts of shops, activities, and much more!
- Programmable items with a simple but powerful visual scripting language, which you can produce and sell under a Tropity Business

So now you're probably thinking, what exactly can I make in Tropity?

An office?
You can make it!

A shop where other players can come in and buy items I have created?
Of course!

A Huge house with a swimming pool?
Yep, that too!

Anything and everything is possible in the world of Tropity. So get out there and start playing now!

(MacOS release will come shortly after Windows release. Roughly 2 weeks after)

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
